title: Awesome Chinese Thesis Template
description: A modern and customizable LaTeX thesis template designed for Chinese universities. Supports Overleaf and local compilation, with a clean and modular structure for academic writing. Includes strict licensing terms for attribution and non-commercial use, and is intended for reusable thesis workflows.

title: Agricultural Intelligent Robot
description: Participated in the development of an agricultural robotic system integrating a mobile platform and manipulator arm. Designed and implemented pipelines for plant data acquisition, 3D reconstruction, robot control, and data analysis, including leaf-level 3D modeling and growth indicator extraction.

title: Pathology Slide Classification & LLM Distillation
description: Automated pathology slide classification using CNN and ResNet18 models, achieving 88% balanced accuracy with lightweight model distillation.

title: Pocket Frequency Meter
description: Designed a portable microcontroller-based frequency meter with embedded firmware, achieving ±0.1 Hz accuracy across 100+ test signals.

title: Enterprise Network Virtual Model
description: Built a virtual enterprise network and completed configuration of network segments, devices, and routing.

title: Plant3D: A Self-Constructed Plant 3D Reconstruction Dataset
description: A self-constructed RGB-D plant 3D reconstruction dataset containing raw, masked, sparse, and dense reconstructions for multiple plant instances.

title: Obj3D: A Self-Constructed Multi-Object 3D Reconstruction Dataset
description: A multi-object RGB-D 3D reconstruction dataset for benchmarking reconstruction pipelines across object categories.

title: Handwritten Chinese Sentence Recognition using CNN-CTC
description: End-to-end handwritten Chinese text recognition system using CNN, BiLSTM, and CTC.

title: Electronic Password Lock System
description: FPGA-based electronic password lock using finite-state machine control with functional validation.

title: Multifunctional Digital Clock
description: Microcontroller-based system implementing Pomodoro timer, countdown, and stopwatch functions.

title: Tourism Website Big Data Analysis and Application
description: Web scraping with Jsoup, storage in HBase, and visualization with ECharts for hotel pricing and review analysis.

title: Digital Baseband Transmission System Simulation
description: Simulation of digital baseband transmission system analyzing ISI-free filtering and AWGN channel effects.

title: Frequency-Domain Analysis of Discrete-Time Signals and Systems
description: Implemented DFT/IDFT for signal analysis and frequency-domain system behavior evaluation.

title: Multi-Functional Quiz Buzzer System
description: 8-channel digital quiz buzzer system with countdown timer and priority logic.

title: Electronic Music Box
description: Custom PCB-based music box with selectable songs and light control circuits.

title: Electronic Keyboard
description: 21-key digital keyboard with adjustable pitch and tone synthesis.
